connect.title: Connect Your Decentralized Health Identity
connect.subtitle: No account or password needed. Your wallet is your identity. ZKP protects: your health data never leaves your device.
connect.notSupported: {walletId} is not supported yet. Please use MetaMask or scan to connect
connect.noMetaMask: MetaMask not detected. Please install the extension first
connect.privacyDisclaimer: Privacy Notice: After connection, your wallet address will be used to generate a privacy space, but health data will be fully encrypted and stored locally.
connect.demoModalDesc: Demo mode uses a virtual wallet address. You can experience the complete health data input and ZK proof generation process, but cannot perform on-chain verification.
connect.qrModalDesc: Use a WalletConnect-compatible wallet to scan the QR code

hero.title: Privacy-First
hero.subtitle: Verify compliance without uploading raw medical records. Mathematical proofs ensure your data never leaves your device.
hero.feature1Desc: Prove information is true without revealing raw data
hero.feature2Desc: High-efficiency compliance engine for rapid auditing
hero.feature3Desc: Full control over how your health data is used

workflow.subtitle: Data Available, Never Exposed
workflow.description: Using zero-knowledge proof technology, we complete identity and compliance verification without leaking any raw health data.
workflow.step1Desc: User health data is standardized on the local device. The lightweight rules engine loads instantly, ensuring data complies with privacy policies before leaving the device.
workflow.step2Desc: The core privacy step. The system locally generates a mathematical proof verifying data validity (e.g., age > 18, healthy BMI) — raw health data never leaves the user's device.
workflow.step3Desc: The server only receives and verifies the zero-knowledge proof. Upon success, an access token is automatically granted. The server cannot reverse-engineer the user's health metrics.

trust.title: Building a Reliable, Secure Digital Foundation
trust.description: Our system architecture fully adheres to industry security standards, providing stable and reliable privacy verification services.
trust.feature1Desc: AES-256 standard to ensure user privacy.
trust.feature3Desc: CDN distribution network with multi-language support.

privacy.title: Privacy-Preserving Verification Demo
privacy.subtitle: Visually compare Zero-Knowledge Proofs vs. traditional data transfer. Modify the data on the left and observe the fundamental difference in what the server receives under "Traditional" vs. "ZKP" mode.
privacy.localNote: Data processed locally in your browser only
privacy.msgPass: Proof valid: User meets all health compliance rules.
privacy.msgFail: Proof invalid: User does not satisfy some rules.
privacy.reasonBmi: BMI is outside the healthy range
privacy.zkpNote: Raw health data (age, height, weight) is absent from this object — only verified rule metadata is included.
privacy.traditionalNote: Warning: Your actual age, height, and weight are exposed to the server in plaintext.
privacy.footerZkp: ZKP Mode: Uses mathematical constructs to prove "I meet the conditions" without revealing "what I am." The server only sees a boolean result and an encrypted proof string.
privacy.footerTraditional: Traditional Mode: All raw data must be uploaded for server validation — increasing the risk of privacy breaches during transmission and centralized storage.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Reshaping the health data ecosystem — giving data sovereignty back to users.
about.visionDesc: This project (ZK-Health Core) explores how Zero-Knowledge Proofs and a lightweight rules engine can verify identity and medical compliance without ever exposing raw sensitive health data. We believe that in the future of digital healthcare, privacy protection should be infrastructure, not an option.
about.card1Desc: Cryptographic math guarantees — zero risk of data leakage.
about.card2Desc: Your health data truly stays in your hands.
about.card3Desc: Barrier-free medical data verification while preserving privacy.
about.projectDesc: This is a showcase system architecture demo with a full-stack simulated implementation using React, Next.js, Web3 (Circom/SnarkJS), and other modern technologies.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.subtitle: Your privacy is the core design principle of ZK-Health Core. This statement explains how we use zero-knowledge proof technology to protect your data.
privacyPage.section1Desc: **The answer is: We do not collect your raw health data.** In traditional medical systems, your age, height, weight, and medical records are sent to a central server. In ZK-Health Core, all sensitive physiological input data **remains entirely in your browser's local memory**.
privacyPage.section2Desc2: Generate proofs on your device using WebAssembly, completely offline.
privacyPage.section2Desc4: The server receives only an encrypted proof string and a boolean 'pass/fail' value.
privacyPage.section2Desc6: Verification results can be recorded to smart contracts (if needed) for immutable public audit.
privacyPage.section2Analogy: Imagine you need to prove you're over 18 to enter an internet cafe. With ZKP, you don't need to show your ID card with your name and address — just submit an absolute mathematical proof that you meet the condition.
privacyPage.section3Desc: As a demo architecture, this website **does not use any third-party trackers, advertising cookies, or persistent local storage**. Data entered in the 'Interactive Demo' section remains in memory during the current session and is destroyed upon page refresh — feel free to explore.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Please read the following statements before accessing or using ZK-Health Core.
terms.disclaimerDesc: This website (ZK-Health Core) is a demo prototype system for graduation project and academic research purposes only — **not a formal commercial medical product**. The partners, compliance data, and interactive logic displayed are for technical demonstration only and have no legal or medical validity.
terms.section1Desc: By accessing or using this system, you agree to be bound by this disclaimer and terms. If you do not agree to any part of these terms, please do not continue using this demo website.
terms.section2Desc: Portions of the frontend design and basic cryptography architecture code are licensed under MIT or GPL (see LICENSE in the repository). You may reference this code for learning and research purposes, but commercial or illegal use is prohibited.
terms.section3Desc1: The ZK (zero-knowledge proof) circuits in this system are generated in the browser and may experience latency variations due to device performance differences.
terms.section3Desc2: As this system is purely for demonstration, although we ensure data isolation in structure, it has not undergone multi-party authoritative code audits.
terms.section3Desc3: Do NOT enter any truly sensitive real medical record numbers in this demo system — it is for testing logic only.

footer.copyright: © {year} Privacy Protection System. All rights reserved.
footer.description: This system is designed to resolve the contradiction between high-sensitivity data verification and privacy protection, primarily applied in healthcare and insurance technology.
footer.descriptionHighlight: high-sensitivity data verification and privacy protection

layout.siteDescription: Privacy protection system for high-sensitivity data verification, resolving the contradiction between data verification and leakage.

connect.title: Connect Your Decentralized Health Identity
connect.subtitle: No username or password needed, wallet is your identity. Zero-knowledge proof protection: Your health data never leaves your local device.
connect.newUserTitle: First time? Create your digital identity in just 1 minute.
connect.privacyDisclaimer: Privacy Commitment: We are a fully decentralized application (dApp). Your private keys always remain on your device. We (the developers) cannot access any of your data or assets.
